    • extractKeys

      public static Set<String> extractKeys(org.json.JSONObject jsonObject)
      Extracts all keys from the given JSONObject, including nested keys, in the format of "key.subkey".
      Parameters:
      jsonObject - The JSONObject to extract keys from.
      Returns:
      A Set containing all keys in the desired format.

    • leftPadStringLeftTrim

      public static String leftPadStringLeftTrim(String str, String fill, int length)
      "abcdef", " ", 5 -> "bcdef"
      "abc", " ", 5 -> " abc"

      public static String leftPadStringRightTrim(String str, String fill, int length)
      "abcdef", " ", 5 -> "abcde"
      "abc", " ", 5 -> " abc"
